prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Lobeglitazone 0.5mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 78.6 kg; Height 164.6 cm; BMI 29.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 144/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 8.3%), FPG (12 months ago 196mg/dL; 9 months ago 218mg/dL; 6 months ago 189mg/dL; 3 months ago 214mg/dL; current 193mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.2kg; 9 months ago 77.1kg; 6 months ago 77.9kg; 3 months ago 75.3kg; current 78.6kg), Height (12 months ago 164.6cm; 9 months ago 164.6cm; 6 months ago 164.6cm; 3 months ago 164.6cm; current 164.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 29.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 145mmHg; 9 months ago 146mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 147mmHg; current 144mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 57U/L; 9 months ago 57U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 56U/L; current 51U/L), AST (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 55U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 57U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 155mg/g; 9 months ago 118mg/g; 6 months ago 127mg/g; 3 months ago 130mg/g; current 161mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 51mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 145mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.1g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
